content: The dashboard page takes 8 seconds to load. Can you figure out why?
I analyzed the network requests during page load. The `/api/dashboard/stats` endpoint takes 6.2 seconds to respond. It's making 3 sequential database queries that could be parallelized.

The `getUserStats`, `getRevenueData`, and `getActivityFeed` calls are independent but run sequentially. Wrap them in `Promise.all`:

```js
const [stats, revenue, activity] = await Promise.all([
  getUserStats(userId),
  getRevenueData(userId),
  getActivityFeed(userId)
])
```
This should bring load time under 2 seconds.
